title: calyptropsidium sartorianum
intro: Calyptropsidium sartorianum, commonly known as Chinese angelica tree or sartorin tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Calyptropsidium sartorianum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various infectious diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations to promote overall well-being.
